check_interval.label: Check interval (seconds)
check_interval.description: How often to check for updates automatically. Minimum 30 seconds.

show_count.label: Show update count
show_count.description: Display the number of available updates next to the icon.

icon_glyph.label: Widget icon
icon_glyph.description: The icon glyph displayed in the bar widget. Defaults to package-update.
